creator: bmah@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I'm opposed to extending pkg_version into a generalized ports/packages 
updating tool.  I don't think it's silly at all to have multiple tools; 
rather, it'd be kind of silly for me to duplicate pkg_update inside 
of pkg_version.  pkg_sign, et al., deal with signatures on packages but 
I am not sure if we're actively using it now. 

Have you tried pkg_update to see if it helps do what you want?
